_comment: Annotated example ~/.minsky/config.json. Copy to ~/.minsky/config.json and edit. This file is strict JSON (jq-parseable); the _* keys are documentation-only and ignored by the runner. Every key here is read by bin/minsky-run.sh — see docs/configuration.md for the full key table and the env-var overrides that win per-run.
_comment_cloud_agent: Which agent runs in cloud mode: openhands (default) | claude | devin | aider. Read at bin/minsky-run.sh (.cloud_agent // "openhands"). Env override: MINSKY_CLOUD_AGENT.
_comment_local_llm: Local-LLM fallback preference. Setting local_llm_enabled:true routes every iteration through the operator's local OpenAI-compatible endpoint (Ollama / LM Studio / MLX) with zero cloud tokens — no env vars required. Env override: MINSKY_LOCAL_LLM=1 forces it on for one run.

local_llm._comment_model: LiteLLM model id for the local backend. ollama_chat/<name> for Ollama; lm_studio/<name> for LM Studio. Read at bin/minsky-run.sh (.local_llm.model // "ollama_chat/qwen3-coder:30b").
local_llm._comment_base_url: Base URL of the local OpenAI-compatible server. Ollama default is 11434; LM Studio default is 1234. Read at bin/minsky-run.sh (.local_llm.base_url // "http://localhost:11434").

_comment_openhands: OpenHands backend model (LiteLLM id) used when cloud_agent is openhands and local_llm_enabled is false. Read at bin/minsky-run.sh (.openhands.model // "claude-opus-4-7").
_comment_default_host: The git repo minsky operates on by default. Override per-invocation with --host <path> or run --hosts-dir <parent> for fleet mode.
